title: Nicholas Tang
text:
Here lies a compilation of my favorite quotes:

“I think that everyone is always trying their best” - Ms. Lisa Sohn (my favorite eng teacher, not verbatim)

While comforting, it does make an easy excuse to get out of work. One can simply say that they are already trying my best and thus do not need to push myself to learn or achieve more. Discounting that, this quote certainly does help us sympathize other people more by giving them the benefit of the doubt.


if I was literate there’d probably be more on this page…
